title: KnockbackSync+
description: A plugin that adds a balanced knockback system to your server.
body:
## **KnockbackSync**

**KnockbackSync** is a simple PvP plugin that fixes one of the biggest problems in Minecraft combat — ping.

Normally, players with higher ping get delayed knockback, which makes fights feel inconsistent and unfair. KnockbackSync removes that delay and makes knockback feel the same for everyone, no matter their connection.

---

## **What it does**

### **No more ping delay**

Knockback is applied instantly instead of being affected by latency.

* Hits feel responsive
* No delayed knockback
* Everyone gets the same experience

---

### **Consistent fights**

Every player takes knockback the same way.

* No advantage for low ping players
* No disadvantage for high ping players
* More skill-based PvP

---

### **Server-side handling**

Knockback is handled properly on the server instead of relying on the client.

* More accurate hit registration
* Less randomness in fights
* Cleaner overall combat

---

### **Adjustable values**

You can tweak how knockback feels.

* Change horizontal and vertical strength
* Keep it vanilla or make your own style
* Works for any type of server

---

## **Why use it**

If your server has PvP, this just makes it better.

No weird delays, no unfair fights — just clean, consistent knockback for everyone.

---
